title: viola marina
intro: Viola marina, also known as sea pansy, is a type of aquatic flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The herbal preparations of Viola marina typically involve drying the plant material or extracting its active compounds, often in the form of teas, capsules, or tinctures.
